_description: Tool Recipes — pre-defined MCP + Agent combinations for common workflows. Use: mcp recipe <name>

security-audit.description: Full security audit of a codebase
security-audit.output: Combined security report with vulnerability list and fix recommendations

pr-review.description: Complete pull request review (quality + security + performance)
pr-review.output: PR review summary with categorized findings

new-feature.description: Plan → implement → test → review a new feature
new-feature.output: Implemented feature with tests and review passed

open-source-release.description: Prepare a project for open-source release
open-source-release.output: Sanitized codebase with LICENSE, README, CONTRIBUTING, and issue templates

ui-sprint.description: Design → build → animate → test a UI feature
ui-sprint.output: Production-ready UI component with animations and tests
